# ParallelismProvider

Analyze a StorageProgram s instruction list to identify independent instruction groups that can execute concurrently . Builds a dependency graph from binding writes ( bindAs ) to binding reads ( closure functions ) , partitions instructions into parallel layers via topological sort , and reports the maximum parallelism and theoretical speedup ratio

## Commands

### analyze
Walk the instruction list . Track which instructions write bindings 
 ( get find mapBindings via bindAs ) . Track which instructions read 
 bindings ( branch condition , pureFrom fn , putFrom valueFn , mergeFrom 
 fieldsFn , delFrom keyFn conservatively assume these read ALL 
 previously written bindings ) . Build dependency edges . Partition 
 into parallel layers via topological sort . Report layers , critical 
 path length , max parallelism , and speedup ratio .

**Arguments:** `$0` **program** (string)
